title: Moonstone: bridge
description: This mod is the bridge for all branches of Moonstone
body:
This module is the "bridge" for all branches of Moonstone.

If you install [MoonsoneOther](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonstone-other) and [Moonstone:Virus](https://modrinth.com/mod/seeking-immortal-virus)
 
There will only be one type of spiritual ball obtained from the loot table (originally there would be two mod of spiritual balls).

And in the case of installing [MoonsoneOther](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonstone-other) and [Moonstone:Nightmare](https://modrinth.com/mod/seeking-immortals-nightmare),It will restore the function of despair resonance
